title: Orthopedic / musculoskeletal / growth (surgery + radiation) entry
context: A core HIGH-burden Ewing late-effect entry for ewing-survivorship-late-effects: Musculoskeletal/growth late effects after surgery and radiation. This is HIGH risk-tier patient-facing health information, so it is education-only with the 'Informational, not medical advice - consult your care team' label, every assertion sourced, the fact-vs-expression copyright firewall (synthesize facts and cite; never reproduce protected guideline text/tables/figures) upheld, and out-of-scope content (diagnosis, prognosis, dosing, individual risk score, trial-matching) excluded. Publish requires that no patient-facing page ships without BOTH a credentialed pediatric/AYA oncologist AND a patient-advocate version-scoped sign-off (neither alone suffices); until both are secured, content is drafted/held, not published.
objective: Draft the orthopedic/musculoskeletal/growth entry (surgery + radiation exposures), fully sourced and dual-signed.
acceptanceCriteria: Plain-language, education-only entry keyed to surgery and radiation exposures; every assertion sourced; no-advice label; correct red-flag/seek-care routing; grade 6-8; WCAG 2.2 AA
No individualized advice or risk figure; health-system-neutral where guidance differs by guideline
Passes all automated gates and carries both oncologist + advocate version-scoped sign-offs
